subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Hope, ultimate Object of my longing and Goal of my aspirations! Thy victorious servant awaiteth the wondrous tokens of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و منتهی املی و غایه منائی ان عبدک المنتصر منتظر لبدایع الطافک
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @pain of love; love as veil, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
